title: Artisan No-Knead Crusty Bread
ingredients: ½ tsp instant or rapid rise yeast (recommend SAF)
instructions: Put 3 cups flour in a large mixing bowl.
Add yeast and salt to the flour.
Mix the dough together, being careful not to over mix.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap.
Let the dough sit for 12-18 hours.
Once the oven has reached 450 degrees, put a heavy cast iron dutch oven or clay baker with lid in the oven to preheat for 30 minutes.
Heavily flour a surface and your hands.
Gently form the sticky mass of dough into a round ball and smooth the surface.
Place dough ball on parchment paper and cover with plastic wrap while pots preheat.
After 30 minutes, carefully place the dough into the preheated pot.
Bake for 30 minutes with the lid on to create steam.
Remove the lid and bake for an additional 15 minutes.
notes: This is a very forgiving and adaptable recipe.
When you form the dough, you can add in mix-ins such as cheese, herbs, or sun dried tomatoes.
